results.title: Login Event - User Authentication
results.notes: gtm.load event triggered, user_id set in GA config, currency USD and language en-US included. GTM ID: G-S2KXT3KTJZ, debugMode: true.

results.title: view_item_list - Category Page
results.notes: Event fires on /snacks category. item_list_id: category_snacks_page_1, item_list_name: Category "Snacks" (page 1), items_skus CSV present, items_count: 6 matches visible products.

results.title: view_item - Product Detail Page
results.notes: Event fires on OREO COOKIES PDP. currency: USD, value: 10.2, items[0] with item_id 6052259, item_name, price 10.2, item_category hierarchy (Catalog > Snacks > Snacks & chips).

results.title: select_item - Product Click from List
results.notes: Event fires before navigation when clicking product from category list. item_list_id and item_list_name present, items array with product details.

results.title: add_to_cart - Add Product
results.notes: Event fires on add to cart. currency: USD, value: 1019.9999999999999 (floating point precision, expected ~1020.00 for 100x$10.20), source_route correct, items array with product. Minor: floating point precision issue in value calculation.

results.title: view_cart - Cart Page Load
results.notes: Event fires on /cart page load. currency: USD, value: 2040, items array with all cart items, items_count: 1 matching cart contents.

results.title: update_cart_item - Quantity Change
results.notes: Event fires on quantity increment. item_id: 6052259, new_quantity: 200, previous_quantity: 100.

results.title: remove_from_cart - Remove Item
results.notes: Event fires on item removal. currency: USD, value: 2040, items array with removed item (quantity: 200, price: 10.2).

results.title: clear_cart - Clear All Items
results.notes: Event fires after confirming clear cart dialog. currency: USD, value: 0, items: empty array, items_count: 0. Matches expected results.

results.title: begin_checkout - Start Checkout
results.notes: Event fires on cart page load alongside view_cart. currency: USD, value: 2040, items array with all items, items_count: 1.

results.title: add_shipping_info - Ground Shipping
results.notes: Event fires when Ground shipping selected. shipping_tier: Ground, currency: USD, value: 150 (shipping cost), items array present.

results.title: add_shipping_info - Pickup (Zero Cost)
results.notes: Event fires when Pickup selected. shipping_tier: Pickup, value: 0. Previously reported bug (showing 150) is fixed.

results.title: add_shipping_info - Switch Methods
results.notes: Each shipping method change fires correct event. Ground: value 150, Pickup: value 0, back to Ground: value 150. No stale values.

results.title: add_payment_info - Payment Selected
results.notes: BUG: No add_payment_info event fires when selecting 'Bank card (Datatrans)' payment method. Payment method visually selected in dropdown but no GA4 event pushed to dataLayer. Only shipping-related events appear.
results.expected: add_payment_info event with payment_type: DatatransPaymentMethod, currency: USD, value: order total
results.actual: No add_payment_info event in dataLayer after payment method selection

results.title: place_order - Order Submission
results.notes: Skipped: Requires completing full checkout flow (shipping address + payment details + placing real order). Place Order button was disabled without full checkout configuration. Would create test order requiring cleanup.

results.title: purchase - Payment Complete
results.notes: Marked as Manual in test suite CSV. Requires actual payment processing with Authorize.Net test card.

results.title: view_search_results - Search Results
results.notes: BUG: No view_search_results event fires after search. Instead, a view_item_list event fires with item_list_id: category_undefined_page_1 and item_list_name: Category "undefined" (page 1). The search term is not captured, results_count and results_page are missing.
results.expected: view_search_results event with search_term, results_count, results_page, visible_items
results.actual: view_item_list event with item_list_id: category_undefined_page_1 (wrong event type, 'undefined' category name)

results.title: add_to_wishlist - Add to List
results.notes: Event fires after adding product to list. currency: USD, value: 10.2, items array with product details including item_id 6052259, item_category hierarchy, affiliation: Lays.

results.title: GA Config - Currency Setting
results.notes: Currency parameter set to USD in GA config event. Matches store currency.

results.title: GA Config - Language Setting
results.notes: Language parameter set to en-US in GA config event. Matches user language setting.

results.title: GA Config - User ID
results.notes: user_id present in GA config. UUID format (36-char GUID). Set after login.

results.title: Event Items - Product Structure
results.notes: Product structure in view_item event contains: item_id (SKU 6052259), item_name, price (10.2), quantity (9290 = inventory), item_category hierarchy (Catalog > Snacks > Snacks & chips up to 3 levels), affiliation (Lays vendor), discount (0).

results.title: Event Timing - Page Load Events
results.notes: view_item_list fires on category page load with correct data (item_list_id: category_snacks_page_1, items_count: 6). Event fires after page content is available, not too early or too late.

results.title: Event Persistence - Multiple Actions
results.notes: All events captured in correct sequence across SPA navigation: view_item_list (category) -> view_item (product) -> view_item_list (recommended) -> add_to_cart. No duplicates, data accurate for each event.

bugs.title: add_payment_info GA4 event not firing when payment method selected
bugs.description: Selecting 'Bank card (Datatrans)' payment method on cart/checkout page does not push an add_payment_info event to the dataLayer. The payment method dropdown visually updates but no GA4 tracking event is generated.
bugs.impact: Payment funnel analytics are incomplete. Cannot track payment method selection step in checkout funnel, affecting conversion analysis.
stepsToReproduce: 1. Login and add product to cart

bugs.title: view_search_results GA4 event missing; fires view_item_list with 'undefined' category instead
bugs.description: Searching for a term (e.g., 'laptop') does not fire a view_search_results event. Instead, a view_item_list event fires with item_list_id 'category_undefined_page_1' and item_list_name 'Category "undefined" (page 1)'. The search term, results count, and page number are not tracked.
bugs.impact: Search analytics completely broken. Cannot track what users search for, search result counts, or search-to-purchase conversion. The 'undefined' category name suggests a code path issue where search results reuse category tracking without proper context.
stepsToReproduce: 4. Wait for results page to load
bugs.expected: view_search_results event with search_term: 'laptop', results_count, results_page: 1, visible_items

observations: GTM container G-S2KXT3KTJZ loaded with debugMode: true on QA environment
dataLayer events use Arguments object format with numeric string keys: e['0']='event', e['1']=event_name, e['2']=params
dataLayer persists across SPA navigations but resets on full page loads
Floating point precision issue in add_to_cart value calculation (1019.9999... instead of 1020.00 for 100x$10.20) - cosmetic, not a functional bug
begin_checkout event fires on cart page load (same time as view_cart), not on a separate checkout step
